---
id: get-ems-trend-device
title: "查询单设备能耗趋势"
description: "按时间维度（1h/1d/month）统计指定设备在设定时间范围内的能耗趋势，返回每个时间段内的能耗值。"
sidebar_label: "查询单设备能耗趋势"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询单设备能耗趋势"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/ems/trend/device"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



按时间维度（1h/1d/month）统计指定设备在设定时间范围内的能耗趋势，返回每个时间段内的能耗值。

:::tip
仅可查询能够提供耗电量数据的设备。详情请参考 Aqara Studio 文档 [能耗管理](https://docs.aqara.com/zh/docs/aqara-studio/energy-management-system#%E5%89%8D%E6%8F%90%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6)。
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["startTime","endTime","deviceId","dimension"],"properties":{"startTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"起始时间（UTC 毫秒时间戳）。","example":1704067200000},"endTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"结束时间（UTC 毫秒时间戳）。","example":1704153600000},"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。","example":"device_001"},"dimension":{"type":"string","description":"聚合维度。","enum":["1h","1d","month"],"example":"1h"}},"title":"EmsTrendDeviceRequest"},"examples":{"hourlyTrend":{"value":{"startTime":1704067200000,"endTime":1704153600000,"deviceId":"device_001","dimension":"1h"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["startTime","value"],"properties":{"startTime":{"type":"string","description":"起始时间，格式取决于查询维度：\n- 1h: yyyyMMddHH\n- 1d: yyyyMMdd\n- month: yyyyMM\n","example":"2024010100"},"value":{"type":"number","format":"double","description":"该时间范围内的能耗值（kWh）","example":1.5}},"title":"EmsTrendPoint"}}}}],"example":{"type":"EmsDeviceTrendResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7f010","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"startTime":"2024010100","value":1.5},{"startTime":"2024010101","value":2.3}]},"title":"EmsDeviceTrendResponse"},"examples":{"hourlyTrendSuccess":{"value":{"type":"EmsDeviceTrendResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7f010","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"startTime":"2024010100","value":1.5},{"startTime":"2024010101","value":2.3},{"startTime":"2024010102","value":0.8}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
